properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: How lovely is your dwelling place Oh, Lord Almighty For my soul longs and even faints for You For here my heart is satisfied Within Your presence I sing beneath the shadow of Your wings

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Better is one day in Your courts Better is one day in Your house Better is one day in Your courts Than thousands elsewhere

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: One thing I ask and I would seek To see Your beauty To find You in the place Your glory dwells One thing I ask and I would seek To see Your beauty To find You in the place Your glory dwells

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: My heart and flesh cry out For You, the living God Your Spirit's water to my soul I've tasted and I've seen Come once again to me I will draw near to You I will draw near to You
